key_points: The story is written by H.G. Wells
It is a science fiction story
Griffin discovers the secret of invisibility
The story highlights misuse of science
important_incidents: Footprints appearing without a visible person
Griffin hiding in a London store
Strange events at the inn in Iping
values_and_messages: Power must be guided by ethics
Misuse of knowledge leads to destruction
exam_tips: Remember Griffin is invisible, not magical
Focus on the theme of misuse of science
Explain the title with reference to the footprints
Mention moral or message in long answers
